summary: Video. A Fox News Channel 'BREAKING NEWS / FOX NEWS ALERT' live feed of Secretary Noem deplaning in El Salvador and being greeted on the tarmac by officials and security, under the chyron 'DHS SECRETARY NOEM ARRIVES IN EL SALVADOR' with anchor voiceover. It is live news footage with anchor narration, with no music.
notable_text: DHS SECRETARY NOEM ARRIVES IN EL SALVADOR
